name: accountants at small law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month tool
description: For accountants at small law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month, manual reconciliation causes late filings and compliance issues. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
target_audience: accountants at small law firms processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month
problem_solved: manual reconciliation processes are time-consuming and error-prone.
